Our sustainable success is based on our talents and on how we partner with our clients and communities to create lasting value. Job Description The IT Treasury and Trading team delivers efficient, effective support and IT solutions for applications and processes in client order execution, trading, treasury, and lending/collateral management. The team comprises both functional and technical experts supporting a Trading/Treasury room of approximately 50 traders. This role ensures continuity in client services and drives ongoing improvements in deliverable quality. Main responsibilities Run the Bank: end-to-end support on the IT trading platforms used for Securities Lending & Collateral, Islamic Finance, Securities and Derivatives execution and trading, spanning from application maintenance to analysis and resolution on daily incidents, liaising with external vendors where applicable. Run the Bank: act as entry point to trading desk for broader issues that require liaising with other IT departments to cover the full stackor with Operations teamsChange the Bank: coordinate and execute various IT projects aimed at evolving or upgrading the IT trading platforms, either developed and released internally or by application providers: collection of business needs, solution design and documentation, development where applicable and/or vendor coordination, creation of test cases catalogue and execution of IT tests, support to user acceptance test, rollout and post production support Change the Bank: development of departmental applications aimed at covering gaps of the existing IT applications, mainly in the area of system integration and reporting Change the Bank: management of tools for the automation of health checks on trading IT platforms to eventually guarantee the service to internal clients Skills and experience A university degree, preferably in computer science, finance or an equivalent educational background Very good knowledge of programming languages, application serverand database systemsGood knowledge of financial productsand main bank processesVery good analytic skill, tech curiosity, proactivity in identifying the best tech solution to a business need Capability to work under constant pressure FlexibilityCapability to integrate in a wider IT team and good team player Good communication skillsOur Values Accountability: Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement Hands-on: Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results Passionate: Being committed and striving for excellence Solution-driven: Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset Partnership-oriented: Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit. Please ensure to attach a cover letter to your CV when filling the application. Provide functional support and troubleshoot issues related to SAP FICO modules. Collaboration, training & documentation Collaborate closely with SAP experts from other fieldsto ensure end-to-end process integration. Strong understanding of financial processes such as general ledger, accounts payable/receivable, asset accounting, and cost controlling. Experience in SAP configuration and customization of financial modules. Ability to analyze business requirements and translate them into SAP solutions. Experience working with cross-functional SAP modules such as SAP MM and SAP SD is a plus. Excellent problem-solving, communication, and stakeholder management skills. Fluent in English and French.
